title: leucanthemum atratum subsp. halleri
intro: Leucanthemum atratum subsp. halleri, also known as the Alpine Daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Leucanthemum atratum subsp. halleri can be made into infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
